name: The Colonial Motor Company Limited
summary: The Colonial Motor Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates franchised motor vehicle dealerships in New Zealand. It operates 12 Ford motor vehicle dealerships, including 7 Mazda franchises. The company also distributes and retails Kenworth and DAF heavy duty trucks; and retails New Holland, Case IH, and Kubota tractors and equipment. The Colonial Motor Company Limited was founded in 1859 and is based in Wellington, New Zealand.
